# pheno-cli-base

> Shared CLI boilerplate for the Phenotype fleet of command-line
> tools. Bundles the three pieces of plumbing that every Phenotype
> CLI re-implements (`ConfigArg`, `Verbosity`, `setup_tracing`) so
> each binary can depend on one crate and inherit canonical
> behavior.

## Public API

```rust
use clap::Args;
use pheno_cli_base::{ConfigArg, Verbosity, setup_tracing, setup_tracing_from_count};

#[derive(Args)]
pub struct ConfigArg {
    /// Path to a config file (also reads PHENOTYPE_CONFIG).
    #[arg(short, long, env = "PHENOTYPE_CONFIG")]
    pub config: Option<std::path::PathBuf>,
}

#[derive(Args)]
pub struct Verbosity {
    /// Increase log verbosity (-v, -vv, -vvv).
    #[arg(short, long, action = clap::ArgAction::Count, global = true)]
    pub verbose: u8,
    /// Suppress non-error logs.
    #[arg(short, long, conflicts_with = "verbose", global = true)]
    pub quiet: bool,
}

pub fn setup_tracing(filter: tracing_subscriber::EnvFilter);
pub fn setup_tracing_from_count(verbosity: u8, quiet: bool);
pub mod prelude; // re-exports the three items
```

## Quickstart

```toml
# Cargo.toml
[dependencies]
pheno-cli-base = "0.1"
clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }
tracing = "0.1"
tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter"] }
```

```rust
use clap::Parser;
use pheno_cli_base::{ConfigArg, Verbosity, setup_tracing};
#[derive(Parser)] struct Cli { #[command(flatten)] config: ConfigArg,
#[command(flatten)] verbosity: Verbosity }
fn main() { let cli = Cli::parse(); setup_tracing(cli.verbosity.to_filter()); }
```

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`); `#![warn(missing_docs)]` on the
  public API.
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040); see the `coverage` job in
  `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
- `ConfigArg` reads the `PHENOTYPE_CONFIG` env var as a fallback to
  `-c/--config`; `ConfigArg::path()` returns `Option<&Path>`.
- `Verbosity` is a count (`-v`/`-vv`/`-vvv`) plus `-q/--quiet`,
  mutually exclusive; `to_filter()` maps to `tracing_subscriber`
  `LevelFilter` (`INFO` / `DEBUG` / `TRACE` / `ERROR`).
- `setup_tracing` is idempotent: a second call swallows
  `SetGlobalDefaultError` so tests can call it freely.
- `prelude` re-exports the three items for
  `use pheno_cli_base::prelude::*;`.
- Standalone crate (empty `[workspace]` table in `Cargo.toml`); not
  a member of the root monorepo workspace.

## See also

- `README.md` — full API walkthrough, layout, and Commands table.
- `src/config_arg.rs`, `src/verbosity.rs`, `src/tracing.rs` — module
  docs and per-symbol notes.
- `tests/public_api.rs` — integration tests.
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context.
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema).
- `deny.toml` — `cargo-deny` policy.
- `LICENSE-MIT` / `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license.
- Sibling: `pheno-config` (typed config), `pheno-errors` (canonical
  `AppError`), `pheno-context` (request context).
